/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interfaces__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/go2_interfaces/libgo2_interfaces__python.so CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interfaces/srv/_checkpoint_capture_s.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interfaces__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/go2_interfaces/srv/_mission_control_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/unitree/go/Go2Robot/ros_ws/build/go2_interfaces:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libgo2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
